fees.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Courses & Fees 2026
rows: Bachelor's in a relevant discipline + 4 Years of work experience

fees.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Exit Scholarships
rows: Students who graduate from IIM Ahmedabad and going for entrepreneurship
The mentioned monthly stipend shall be provided for at most three consecutive years to two students from every batch opting out of placements and having business ideas.
Scholarships for students who graduate from IIMA and join “Not-for-Proft”organization
Two students from each batch will receive financial aid for a maximum of three consecutive years in an effort to choose careers in non-profit organizations.
INR 3 lakhs to INR 4 lakhs per year
Assistance scholarships for students who graduate from IIM Ahmedabad and pursue doctoral studies
Two students will each get this grant for a maximum of three years to encourage them to pursue PhD studies in India or abroad.
INR 3 lakhs to INR 4 lakhs per year

fees.heading: Scholarships offered by Alumni
rows: 9 students from MBA 1 & MBA/FABM II students from economically and socially challenged backgrounds
INR 2 lakhs to INR 3 lakhs per year
Class of MBA 2001, Peri Viswanath Scholarship
First year performance in MBA/MBA-FABM + Annual Family Income below INR 15 lakhs
Students with educational loan of a minimum INR 1 lakh and those with a combined family income below INR 8 lakhs per annum
Awarded to one MBA first year student at the end of first year as a merit scholarship based on academic performance

admission.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Latest Updates and News
rows: Bachelor’s degree with 50% marks (5% marks relaxation for SC/ST/PwD)
CAT score (95 percentile) + AWT & PI, Final: PI (50%) + AWT (10%) + CAT (25%) + AR (15%), Min CAT Overall: Gen 95, NC-OBC 90, SC 85, ST 75
CAT Exam: Nov 30 2026; Shortlist: Jan 2026; PI: Feb-Mar 2026.
Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in agricultural sciences with 50% marks (5% marks relaxation for SC/ST/PwD)
CAT/ GMAT scores + AWT + PI (agri focus), Final: PI (40%) + AWT (10%) + Composite score (CAT+AR) (50%), Min CAT Overall: Gen 95, NC-OBC 90, SC 85, ST 75
CAT Exam: Nov 30 2026; Shortlist: Jan 2026; PI: Feb-Mar 2026.
Bachelor’s degree + 4 years work experience; Minimum Age of 25 years as on March 31, 2026
Round 2 Registration: Nov 24, 2025 Shortlisting: Dec 5, 2025Final Selection: Jan 20, 2026
